settings.heading: A route for retail, channel, and purchase-location guidance
settings.copy: Use this page for retailer coverage, channel notes, and how customers should choose where to buy.
settings.support_note: Keep this page clean and practical. It should explain channel options, not overwhelm with generic brand language.

settings.heading: Clarify direct, partner, and retail pathways
settings.copy: Use these cards for direct store, retail partner, and regional purchase guidance.

settings.title: Buy directly from the storefront
settings.copy: Use this card for direct-channel advantages or support continuity notes.

settings.title: Retail partner and in-market options
settings.copy: Use this card for reseller, distributor, or partner channel context.

settings.title: Need help choosing the right product first?
settings.copy: Use this card to move customers back into collections or support before purchase.

settings.intro_copy: Use the page body for reseller lists, territory notes, or fuller channel language.
settings.side_heading: Keep channel pages connected to the product layer
settings.side_copy: Use the side card for collection discovery or support routing when customers are not yet sure what they need.

settings.heading: Move from where-to-buy into product and support discovery
settings.copy: Use the CTA to route customers into collections, support, or contact depending on the next best step.
